data.description: Tencent is a leading influencer in industries such as social media, mobile payments, online video, games, music, and more. Leverage Tencent's vast ecosystem of key products across various verticals as well as its extensive expertise and networks to gain a competitive edge and make your own impact in these industries.

DocumentationMobile Live Video BroadcastingProduct Introduction Strengths

Strengths

PDF
Focus Mode
Font Size
Last updated: 2026-03-17 15:26:39

Low Development Cost

Provides a complete live streaming solution with full components and UI for both hosts and viewers, reducing development investment and significantly optimizing development costs.

Fast Integration

With complete components and UI, no need for independent setup. You can integrate and go live in a day, greatly improving development efficiency.

Rich Features

Supports interactive features like chat, gifting, likes, guest interactions, as well as audience management, beauty effects, background music, and more.

Global Real-Time Connectivity

Optimized network architecture ensures low-latency, high-quality interactive experiences worldwide.

Ultra-Low Latency

High-quality audio and video output with low latency (below 300ms), ensuring smooth live interaction and an immersive audio-visual experience.

Premium Video Quality

Uses premium video quality technology to reduce video stuttering and enhance clarity in weak network environments, ensuring a smooth and HD live experience.
